channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 AI agents + crypto ownership could birth trillion-dollar, software-native firms. Agents that own, operate, and access capital—without traditional scaffolding. https://Blockchain.News/news/eigenlayer-founder-ai-agents-becoming-companies-thesis #AI #crypto #agents

item.title: 🔥 SOL: a commodity win signals institutional tilt. RWA apps top $2B, 182K holders, Mastercard on SDP. What does this imply for SOL’s role in on-chain finance? https://Blockchain.News/news/sol-commodity-status-solana-rwa-2b-march-2026 #Solana #RWA #DeFi

item.title: Solana doubles down on security: free 24/7 threat monitoring for $10M+ TVL and free formal verification for $100M+ TVL. 🚨🔒[URL] https://Blockchain.News/news/solana-foundation-stride-security-program-sirn-threat-monitoring #Solana #Security #DeFi
item.description: Solana doubles down on security: free 24/7 threat monitoring for $10M+ TVL and free formal verification for $100M+ TVL. 🚨🔒[URL] https://Blockchain.News/news/solana-foundation-stride-security-program-sirn-threat-monitoring #Solana #Security #DeFi
